---
title: "Utrecht University Library at Oxford's Forum for Open Scholarship"
description: |

author: Dan Rudmann
date: 20 April 2026
---
Last month, I had the distinct honor of presenting a talk at Oxford's Bodliean Library at their annual Forum for Open Scholarship.

The recording of that talk, entitled "A Poetics of Infrastructural Salvage," is available online now at [this link](https://ox.cloud.panopto.eu/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=1a7ff333-ca25-485b-98f3-b405011a9518&start=0).
